task_completion.description: Verify that the video files have been imported into the Nx Witness VMS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Nx Witness VMS interface. The video files should be visible either in the left-hand resource tree (e.g., under 'Local Files') or placed in the main viewing area.

task_completion.description: Verify that the first clip is renamed to 'Exhibit A - Bystander'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Exhibit A - Bystander' in the VMS resource tree or as the title overlay on one of the video panels in the layout.

task_completion.description: Verify that the second clip is renamed to 'Exhibit B - Drone'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Exhibit B - Drone' in the VMS resource tree or as the title overlay on one of the video panels in the layout.

task_completion.description: Verify that a layout named 'Case #4492-Investigation' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a layout tab at the top of the main viewing area or a saved layout item in the resource tree named exactly 'Case #4492-Investigation'.

task_completion.description: Verify that both videos are displayed simultaneously on the layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main viewing area of the 'Case #4492-Investigation' layout. There must be two distinct video panels visible side-by-side or arranged together. One video should appear vertical (Bystander) and the other landscape (Drone).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the Nx Witness VMS graphical interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Nx Witness VMS application window (dark theme, resource tree on the left, viewing grid in the center) must be visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Ensure the videos are displayed inside the VMS, not a standard media player.
integrity.visual_evidence: The videos must be embedded within the Nx Witness layout grid, not opened in external applications like VLC, Celluloid, or the default Ubuntu video player.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just type the target names into a text editor or terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The names 'Exhibit A - Bystander', 'Exhibit B - Drone', and 'Case #4492-Investigation' must appear as UI elements within the Nx Witness VMS, not as text in a terminal, browser, or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires importing two synthetic videos from '/home/ga/Downloads/Evidence' into Nx Witness VMS. The first video ('bystander_clip_01.mp4') is a vertical video (720x1280) and must be renamed to 'Exhibit A - Bystander'. The second video ('drone_survey_clip.mp4') is a landscape video (1920x1080) and must be renamed to 'Exhibit B - Drone'. The layout must be named exactly 'Case #4492-Investigation' and show both the vertical and landscape videos simultaneously in the VMS viewing area.
